content.caption: A dark-themed login screen for an application named Daedalus featuring a classical statue and green accents.
content.description: This image displays a software login interface with a predominantly black background. At the top, a lime green header bar contains the application title 'Daedalus' and standard window controls. Centered on the screen is a grayscale image of a classical statue depicting a seated figure, likely a craftsman or philosopher. Below the statue are two input fields labeled 'Username' and 'Password', followed by a matching lime green 'Sign in' button.
content.scene: A digital login interface for a desktop application.
